name: Full Corpus Appendix — Milestone Route
description: Prerequisite route for Full Corpus Appendix, segmented into milestone episodes by the progression-router planner. Each phase closes on a quest/unlock capstone rather than an arbitrary skill number.

steps.detail: Chickens in Lumbridge. No food needed, fast kills.

hints.note: Bury bones for free Prayer xp.

steps.detail: Cows east of Lumbridge or goblins. Drop bones for Prayer XP.

hints.note: Aggro stops after 10-15min; crowded spot.

methods.location: Fields around Lumbridge (e.g. north of the windmill north-west of Lumbridge for a quieter spot)

quests: The Fremennik Trials (started, for free/cheap Waterbirth Island travel; a 1,000gp toll or unrelated free spots also work)

steps.detail: Barbarians south of Edgeville. Equips steel weapons.

quests: The Fremennik Trials (started, for free/cheap Waterbirth Island travel; a 1,000gp toll or unrelated free spots also work)

methods.location: Edgeville Dungeon, or Chaos Druid Tower
Beach south of Hosidius, Crabclaw Isle, Crabclaw Caves, or Avium Savannah beach

quests: The Depths of Despair (alternative access to Crabclaw Caves; free spots also exist)
items: 10,000 coins (toll for Crabclaw Isle, if that spot is chosen)

steps.detail: Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers (Stronghold). Equips dragon weapons.

hints.note: Big bones always drop — Prayer xp side-benefit.

methods.method: Flesh Crawlers and Zombies (Stronghold of Security, Catacomb of Famine)

Edgeville Dungeon, or Chaos Druid Tower

steps.detail: Moss Giants, Blue Dragons, or Slayer tasks. Equips whip.

hints.note: No single wiki-cited monster fetched for this exact band; Nightmare Zone (needs 5 quests, requirement list unverified) is the wiki's documented 50-99 AFK/fastest method.

North of Yanille, north-west of the bank

hints.note: Superheat Item gives passive Smithing xp on the bar produced.

methods.location: Any bank with ores nearby (e.g. Falador east, Edgeville)
Any safe weak monster with Auto Retaliate on

items: gear with -64 or lower Magic attack bonus

methods.location: Bank with unenchanted emerald bolts + cosmic/air/nature runes

steps.detail: High Alchemy on stackable items. Core money maker.

hints.note: 65xp/cast, up to 78,000xp/h stationary [ref: Pay-to-play Magic training s14].

methods.location: Anywhere with ore stock (bank noted ore)

methods.method: Enchant Crossbow Bolt (highest affordable gem bolts, e.g. Ruby)

steps.detail: Alching or Bursting at Crabs. Unlocks Ice Barrage prerequisite path.

hints.note: Smoke Burst usable from 62; Ice Burst better from 70 — exact xp/h not sourced.

methods.method: Ancient Magicks bursting (Smoke Burst, then Ice Burst)
methods.location: Multi-combat spawn (per-monster; page does not list a crab-specific burst spot)

methods.method: Exploiting elemental weakness on crabs (Frost Crabs, 100% Fire weakness)
Tele-alching (High Level Alchemy chained with a teleport)

steps.detail: Cook shrimps and anchovies. Use range to avoid burning.

hints.note: Buy ~2.5x more raw fish than needed — burn rate is high at low levels [ref: Pay-to-play Cooking training s3].

methods.method: Cook shrimp and anchovies at a bank-adjacent fire or range, keeping extra raw fish on hand to offset burns

Cook the page's current low-tier fish table (sardine, herring, mackerel, trout) at a bank-adjacent fire or range, stocking roughly 2.5x more raw fish than the cooked amount needed since burn rate is high at these levels
1-tick cook poison karambwan from level 1 to skip straight to level 30 in well under ten minutes

steps.detail: Cook trout and salmon from Barbarian Village fishing spots.

methods.method: Cook trout and salmon caught at Barbarian Village fishing spots on a nearby fire or range
Continue with pike (20-25) then salmon (25-30) from the page's current low-tier fish table at a bank-adjacent fire or range
Cook tuna for levels 30-40 at the Hosidius Kitchen (or Myths' Guild/Mor Ul Rek range), from the page's Levels 30-99 fish table
1-tick cook cooked karambwan from level 30 onward after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, for the fastest cooking xp in the game
methods.location: Rogues' Den / Myths' Guild / Mor Ul Rek

steps.detail: Cook lobsters. Stop burning at 74 with cooking gauntlets.

hints.note: Burn-stop table lives on a separate page (Cooking/Burn level) per items-domain gotcha — not re-verified here, XREF: items:

methods.method: Cook lobsters from level 40 onward, wearing cooking gauntlets to reduce the burn rate
Bake pies with the Bake Pie spell after completing Lunar Diplomacy, for fast semi-AFK xp with passive Magic xp as a side effect
methods.location: any location with spell access and an astral rune supply

methods.method: Make jugs of wine from level 35 onward, mainly to push through to level 68 rather than as a primary method since a jug of bad wine can fail for 0 xp below 68
methods.location: a bank near grapes and jugs of water, e.g. Catherby

hints.note: Each thread spool is good for ~5 leather items — bring ~50 thread for the full 1-20 ladder [ref: Pay-to-play Crafting training s3].

steps.detail: Green dragonhide bodies for fast XP. Buy from GE.

steps.detail: Varrock Agility course. Unlocks graceful shortcut uses.

mapMarkers.label: Man/Woman spawn cluster (Lumbridge, near the general store)
Man/Woman spawn cluster (Edgeville, near the bank)

hints.note: Man pickpocket chance table (Man.s11): level requirement 1, xp 8 per successful pickpocket, 4.8s stun timer, 1 damage on fail (Man.s12). Women share the same pickpocket mechanics as Men on this wiki.
100% drop is Bones; low-value weapon/armour drops (bronze med helm, iron dagger) are typically not worth keeping inventory space for at this training pace.

methods.location: Lumbridge Castle area, or trap a Man near the Draynor Village Agility Course start

steps.detail: Pickpocket HAM members in Lumbridge. Gems and clue scrolls.

mapMarkers.label: H.A.M. Hideout (existing marker retained -- no more-precise {{Map}} pin found on H.A.M. Hideout/H.A.M. Member pages in the sections fetched; Transportation section confirms access via charged amulet of glory to Draynor Village then ~33 tiles east)

hints.note: H.A.M. Member pickpocket chance table (H.A.M._member.s4): level 15, xp 22.2 per success, 4s stun/1-3 damage on fail (H.A.M._member.s5). Loot confirmed: gems (uncut opal 2/102, uncut jade 2/102), full H.A.M. robe set pieces (1/102 each), plus 'easy clue scrolls' per H.A.M. Hideout's own Notable features text -- the existing detail's 'gems and clue scrolls' claim is confirmed for gems, clue-scroll rate stays '??' (not itemized in the DropsTableHead sections fetched).

3 failed pickpockets within one hideout visit gets you booted or jailed (H.A.M._member.s1); a high Agility level or a full H.A.M. robe set (~4% reduction per piece, ~28% for all 7) lowers ejection chance but does NOT improve pickpocket success rate itself.
Single hideout instance per world; hop if crowded.

methods.method: Steal from bakery stalls (East Ardougne market)

steps.detail: Requires 60 Strength to enter. High-tier drops including Godswords.

mapMarkers.label: GWD entrance hole (surface, north of Trollheim)

hints.note: With Eadgar's Ruse + Magic 61: Trollheim Teleport lands on the mountain east of Troll Stronghold, then walk down + north (agility shortcuts lvl41-47 shorten it). Without: teleport to Burthorpe, needs climbing boots + rope + start of Troll Stronghold, follow the blue route past Death Plateau (Protect from Range) or via Tenzing's house.

North side of the mountain near the entrance has thrower trolls; the chill-effect zone also drains stats/run/special every few seconds unless Fire of Unseasonal Warmth is built (Making Friends with My Arm + Construction 60).

steps.instruction: Complete Tale of the Righteous (Zeah intro)

hints.note: start: ask about the expedition

steps.detail: Grants Cooking gauntlets (stop burning food) and Goldsmith gauntlets (Smithing XP boost).
Required to train Herblore. Short quest, no stat requirements.

hints.note: start option
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Unlocks 1-tick Karambwan cooking for fast Cooking XP.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Plant potato, onion, or cabbage allotments; collect produce. Check at natural banking breaks — do not interrupt active training.
Unlocks herb patches worldwide. Critical prerequisite for the herb farming supply chain.

mapMarkers.label: Martin the Master Gardener, Draynor Village pig pen (start)

hints.note: start: ask about the failing farm patches
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.instruction: Buy pineapples from Catherby charter ship
steps.detail: Purchase pineapples from the charter ship NPC at Catherby docks. Non-GE source. ~100 per visit depending on stock.

mapMarkers.label: Trader Crewmember (Catherby docks) -- corrects existing marker (2834,3445) 'Catherby', which lands off the actual NPC pin

hints.note: Trader Crewmember Stock table (Trader_Crewmember.s3): Pineapple stock=15/restock=100s. A 30-pineapple ultracompost batch (per setup-ultracompost's recipe) needs either two visits ~50min apart or a world-hop to refill a second Trader Crewmember's independent stock (16 dock locations total, per Trader_Crewmember.s1).

steps.instruction: Mine volcanic ash at Fossil Island
steps.detail: Mine volcanic ash from the ash piles on Fossil Island. Used to make ultracompost. Loop during farm-run downtime.

mapMarkers.label: Fossil Island Volcano (ash-pile mining site, per infobox map marker)

hints.value: 1 ash/pile at lvl22, +1 per 15 levels to 6 at lvl97
hints.note: Volcanic_ash s3: yield scales with Mining level, 1 ash at 22, +1 every 15 levels (37=2,52=3,67=4,82=5,97=6). Mining enhancers (Varrock armour, mining cape, mining gloves) do NOT affect yield (Mod Ash, cited on-page). 'At high Mining levels, possible to obtain over 6,500 ash per hour.'
Step's own detail says 'Loop during farm-run downtime' -- consistent with U7 semi-atomic farm-run pattern.

steps.detail: Fill compost bins with 30 pineapples then add 15 volcanic ash per bin to produce ultracompost. Ahead-of-time stockpile before herb runs.

mapMarkers.label: Ectofuntus (Port Phasmatys) -- for the step's own location.zone label
Nearest real compost bin, west of Port Phasmatys (Compost_bin.s1 map pin)

hints.note: Direct method (no bin needed): use 2 volcanic ash on 1 bucket of already-made supercompost -> 1 bucket ultracompost, 2 ticks, 1.1 farming xp. Fastest per-bucket path if supercompost buckets are already on hand.

Compost-bin method: bin already containing supercompost + 25 volcanic ash (consumed regardless of bin fill level) -> collect 15 buckets of ultracompost via 15 empty buckets, 10 xp/bucket. Big Compost Bin (Farming Guild, 45 Farming) doubles every number: 30 buckets, 50 ash, 30 buckets to collect.

steps.detail: Withdraw: coins (charter fare + 30 pineapples, total ??), Digsite pendant or Fossil Island transport (??). No other inventory needed — pineapples and ash fill en route.

mapMarkers.label: Fossil Island Volcano (ash-pile mining site, per gather-volcanic-ash)

hints.note: Keep a charged pendant banked separately for repeat runs.

Fossil_Island s1: digsite pendant is the fastest (teleports near the Digsite barge, speak to the barge guard to fast-travel to Museum Camp; can also be charged on the House on the Hill strange machine for a repeatable house-teleport option). Without a pendant: Digsite teleport scroll (lands SW of the barge) or a gnome glider to Lemanto Andra (SW of the barge, reachable via ring of dueling->Emir's Arena glider, Al Kharid gem-trader glider, or a royal seed pod to the Grand Tree glider after Monkey Madness II).

steps.detail: Plant ranarr seeds in herb patches with ultracompost; harvest ranarr weed. ~6.5 ranarr per run at 32 Farming with ultracompost. Loop every ~80 minutes.

mapMarkers.label: Falador herb patch (south of Falador, gardener Elstan)
Catherby herb patch (north of Catherby, gardener Dantaera)
Ardougne herb patch (north of Ardougne, gardener Kragen)
Hosidius herb patch (SW corner of Hosidius, gardener Marisi)

hints.value: min 6 w/ ultracompost; ~8.8 avg w/ ultracompost+secateurs+cape
hints.note: Herb_patch: 'using ultracompost...increase the minimum yield to 6 herbs per seed' (with 3 base harvest lives +1 per compost tier, max 6 w/ ultracompost, per the same yield mechanic documented on Guam_seed s2). Herb_patch/Seeds footnote: average-profit column 'Assumes average of 8.8 herbs per seed in a standard (non-protected) herb patch' premised on ultracompost+magic secateurs+farming cape (empirical sample).
RECURRING -- one atom per run, patch route ordered per pps-03-withdraw-herb-run (XREF: bg:pps-03-withdraw-herb-run).

steps.detail: Withdraw: seed dibber, spade, rake, magic secateurs if owned (optional), N ranarr seeds + N ultracompost (N = patch count), run teleports (Explorer's ring → Falador patch ??, Camelot → Catherby, Ardougne cloak/tele, Xeric's talisman → Hosidius ??).

mapMarkers.label: Catherby herb patch (Camelot landing, run east)
Farming Guild herb patch (optional 5th leg, Farming 65 required)

hints.note: Route order = list order; skip any patch whose teleport is locked.

steps.instruction: Gather snape grass at Waterbirth Island
steps.detail: Pick snape grass spawns on Waterbirth Island. No quest gate. JIT batch just before a brewing session.

mapMarkers.label: Snape grass spawn cluster (Waterbirth Island, one of 26 mapped tiles)

hints.note: No respawn-timer or spawns-per-hour figure stated on the item page; treat as a fixed-tile ground-spawn walk loop, not RNG drops.

steps.detail: Buy vial-of-water packs from a herblore shop vendor (vendor ?? — verify non-GE source) OR blow vials from molten glass (Crafting 33) and fill at a fountain. One vial per potion.

mapMarkers.label: Jatix's Herblore Shop (Taverley) -- centroid of the shop's {{Map|mtype=polygon}} footprint

hints.note: Jatix's Herblore Shop Stock table (StoreTableHead sellmultiplier=1000 buymultiplier=700 delta=30): Vial of water stock=750/restock=100s, or buy the Water-filled vial pack (stock=750/restock=50s) for a batched purchase. A single 14-vial brewing run (per pps-05-withdraw-brew's loadout) is far under base stock -- no world-hop needed.

steps.detail: Withdraw: 14 grimy ranarr + 14 vials of water (clean-then-unf in one sitting; two half-inventories per load). Snape grass stays banked until the unf potions are made.

hints.note: Clean while walking to the bank — zero-time embed.
Herb cleaning and unf-mixing are click-paced; pair with bank-adjacent idle.

steps.detail: Deposit all prayer potions. Chain is 'done' for now when banked stock meets the active goal's demand (e.g., barrows: 20× prayer_potion_4 per SYNTHESIS goals example); otherwise the RECURRING herb-run loop keeps firing.
Combine ranarr weed + snape grass → prayer potion (4). Requires Druidic Ritual and Herblore 52. Terminal step of the prayer-pot supply chain.

hints.note: Base recipe output is Prayer potion(3) — the target stays prayer_potion_4 for chain-slug consistency, but reaching an actual 4-dose potion needs this amulet chance (or combining leftover doses). Ref: Prayer potion Creation section.

steps.detail: Speak to the Lumbridge Cook to begin Recipe for Disaster. Unlock the 10-person banquet table.

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmers until ranarr seeds banked
steps.detail: Master Farmer at Draynor market. Keep herb seeds, drop junk seeds. Need one ranarr seed per patch per planned run (patches: Falador, Catherby, Ardougne, Hosidius + Farming Guild if unlocked). Seed rate: ??

mapMarkers.label: Master Farmer (Draynor Village) -- corrects existing marker (3088,3255), off by ~9 tiles; sourced from Master_Farmer's own {{LocLine|x:3080,y:3250}} pin

hints.note: Seed table is random; bank each ranarr immediately (HC habit).

hints.value: 1/268.75 (or 1/555.83 past Farming 85) inside the herb table, and the herb table itself is only 48/1000 of a successful pickpocket
hints.note: Master Farmer pickpocket chance table (Master_Farmer.s3): 90/240 (low/high out of 256) at level 1-99 normal, level requirement 38. Ranarr seed rate composite: chance-to-hit-herb-table (48/1000) x chance-of-ranarr-within-table (1/268.75) -- exact seeds-per-hour stays '??', not stated as a rate on this page.

steps.instruction: Buy best available scimitar (Zeke, Al Kharid)
steps.detail: Al Kharid gate toll 10 coins (free after Prince Ali Rescue). Buy the best scimitar your Attack level allows from Zeke's shop (stock tiers ?? — verify top tier). Re-visit at each Attack breakpoint.

mapMarkers.label: Zeke (Al Kharid) -- confirmed via Zeke's own {{NPC map|x=3288|y=3190|r=3}} pin, matches the existing step marker exactly.

hints.note: 10-coin toll; Prince Ali Rescue removes it permanently if already done.

Zeke's Stock table (StoreTableHead sellmultiplier=1000 buymultiplier=550 delta=20): Bronze stock 5/restock 100s, Iron stock 3/restock 200s, Steel stock 2/restock 600s, Mithril stock 1/restock 4000s (~66.7min). Exact coin price unresolved -- base item value x buymultiplier is the shop-price formula but the wiki does not spell out the post-delta price per unit, staying '??'.

hints.note: Raw_monkfish s1 Fishing info: tool=Small fishing net, bait=No. Fishing_spot page confirms 'Always' rarity (guaranteed catch on success roll, no drop-chance variance beyond the standard skilling success curve).

Piscatoris_Fishing_Colony s1, ranked shortest-run-to-spot first: Western banner 3/4 (centre of colony) > Piscatoris teleport (entrance) > Fairy ring AKQ (Hunter area, south of entrance) > Necklace of passage (Outpost, well south). Kathy Corkat ferries from west of Tree Gnome Stronghold for free once Swan Song is complete (50gp before); 75 Sailing + full Swan Song also unlocks mooring a boat on the NW side.

steps.detail: Cook raw monkfish on a range. Stop burning at 92 (68 with cooking gauntlets). Terminal step of the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: 1 raw_monkfish -> 1 food_monkfish per action (ticks=1, facilities=Cooking range). Ref: Monkfish Creation.
Wearing cooking gauntlets lowers the stop-burning level; see notes for the full table.

steps.detail: Hunt and cook a jubbly bird near Rantz in Feldip Hills. Hunter 41 + Cooking 41 required.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Prepare a creme brulee supreme. Requires Cooking 70. Ice gloves needed during boss fight (from Ice Queen).

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Defeat 6 Culinaromancer minions with boosted combat stats. Rewards: Barrows gloves (best-in-slot). Attack/Strength/Defence 65 required.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Plant guam seeds in herb patches; harvest guam weed. Provides early herblore training materials before ranarr is available. Loop every ~80 minutes.

hints.value: min 3 harvest lives, +1/compost tier, max 6 w/ ultracompost
hints.note: Guam_seed s2: 'Guam has a minimum of 3 harvest lives, increasing by 1 for each tier of compost used (for a maximum of 6 when using ultracompost)'; plus a per-harvest chance to not consume a life scaling 10.2% (lvl 1) to 31.6% (lvl 99) Farming, interpolated linearly.

RECURRING, ahead-of-time per the step's own timing field. XREF: bg:bootstrap-gather-guam_weed-prayer-pot-supply for the one-time pre-loop gather that seeds this cycle before the first guam patch is planted.
